task_snapshots.description:
# 501b — Batch API Routing for Non-Urgent Tasks
**Role:** backend **Priority:** 1 **Scope:** medium

Docs, formatting, simple tests → route to provider batch APIs at 50% discount. Real-time tasks stay on standard API. Tag tasks as urgent/batch at decomposition.
